testcase.name: Message is succesfully saved in database
testcase.system-out: Scenario Outline: Message is succesfully saved in database &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/LogRepository.feature:6&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[33ma log message arrives we should expect it to be validated and ready for insertion in to database.&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mlog message should be sent in to matching rows either timestamp, message or type.&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36muser should get a confirmation message&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Message is correctly disregarded if database shuts down
testcase.system-out: Scenario Outline: Message is correctly disregarded if database shuts down &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/LogRepository.feature:11&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[33ma&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Successful validation #1
testcase.system-out: Scenario Outline: Successful validation &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/LogValidation.feature:13&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mlog message is received by log validation&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogValidationSteps.log_message_is_received_by_log_validation()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma log message is created with time &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"2026-02-11T11:00:00"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m, message &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"System start"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m, and level &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"INFO"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogValidationSteps.log_message_is_correctly_formatted(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe log message should be accepted&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogValidationSteps.verify_acceptance()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe user should get a confirmation message&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogValidationSteps.verify_acceptance_confirmation()&amp#27;[0m
testcase.system-err: feb. 11, 2026 1:25:07 EM org.hibernate.validator.internal.util.Version <clinit> INFO: HV000001: Hibernate Validator 9.1.0.Final

testcase.name: Successful validation #2
testcase.system-out: Scenario Outline: Successful validation &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/LogValidation.feature:14&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mlog message is received by log validation&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogValidationSteps.log_message_is_received_by_log_validation()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma log message is created with time &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"2026-02-11T11:00:00"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m, message &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"System start"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m, and level &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"WARNING"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogValidationSteps.log_message_is_correctly_formatted(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe log message should be accepted&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogValidationSteps.verify_acceptance()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe user should get a confirmation message&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogValidationSteps.verify_acceptance_confirmation()&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Failed validation due to missing data #1
testcase.system-out: Scenario Outline: Failed validation due to missing data &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/LogValidation.feature:23&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mlog message is received by log validation&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogValidationSteps.log_message_is_received_by_log_validation()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma log message is created with time &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m""&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m, message &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"System start"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m, and level &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"DEBUG"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogValidationSteps.log_message_is_correctly_formatted(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe log message should be rejected due to missing data&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogValidationSteps.deny_acceptance()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe user should get a rejection message describing the error&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogValidationSteps.send_rejection_confirmation()&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Failed validation due to missing data #2
testcase.system-out: Scenario Outline: Failed validation due to missing data &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/LogValidation.feature:24&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mlog message is received by log validation&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogValidationSteps.log_message_is_received_by_log_validation()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma log message is created with time &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"2026-02-11"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m, message &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m""&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m, and level &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"ERROR"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogValidationSteps.log_message_is_correctly_formatted(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe log message should be rejected due to missing data&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogValidationSteps.deny_acceptance()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe user should get a rejection message describing the error&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# logger.steps.LogValidationSteps.send_rejection_confirmation()&amp#27;[0m
